question: List the record company shared by the most number of orchestras.
gold_sql: SELECT Record_Company FROM orchestra GROUP BY Record_Company ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
predicted_sql: SELECT reco_comp FROM orchestra GROUP BY reco_comp ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response: SELECT reco_comp FROM orchestra GROUP BY reco_comp ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
